summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOTTOLAB RBAC refactoring with Super Admin and Company Admin features. 36/36 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tested for both roles. Critical issue found: Company Admin Schedules and Results pages still show ADD/CREATE buttons but should be READ-ONLY.

ui_bugs.issue: Company Admin sees 'ADD SCHEDULE' button but should be READ-ONLY - no create functionality should be visible
Company Admin sees 'POST RESULT' button but should be READ-ONLY - no create functionality should be visible

issues: Load Default button text is 'Charger les défauts' - inconsistent with other French labels which use formal form

action_items: CRITICAL: Update /app/frontend/src/pages/SchedulesPage.js to remove ADD button and CRUD operations for Company Admin - should show read-only view of global schedules
CRITICAL: Update /app/frontend/src/pages/CompanyResultsPage.js to remove POST RESULT button and CRUD operations for Company Admin - should show read-only view of global results
Consider: Create dedicated CompanySchedulesReadOnlyPage.js and CompanyResultsReadOnlyPage.js components that only display data without edit capabilities
critical_code_review_comments: SchedulesPage.js and CompanyResultsPage.js still have full CRUD capabilities which violates RBAC requirements for Company Admin (should be READ-ONLY)
The sidebar correctly shows 'Schedules (View)' and 'Results (View)' indicating read-only intent, but the actual pages have add/edit/delete functionality
Backend correctly blocks POST/PUT/DELETE operations for Company Admin on schedules/results, but frontend still shows the buttons

success_rate.frontend: 90% (main flows working, RBAC UI issue identified)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created temporary test data with TEST_ prefix for branches, schedules, and results which were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major RBAC refactoring tested. Super Admin features (Lottery Catalog with 155 lotteries, Global Schedules, Global Results) are working. Company Admin operational features (Branches, Configuration with 5 tabs, Statistics, Daily Reports) are working. CRITICAL BUG: Company Admin pages for Schedules and Results still show CREATE buttons when they should be READ-ONLY views.

super_admin.login_dashboard: PASS - Login successful, dashboard shows Super Admin Overview
super_admin.lottery_catalog: PASS - Shows 155 lotteries (50 states × 3 games + 5 Haiti), search/filter working, Add/Seed buttons present
super_admin.global_schedules: PASS - CRUD working, modal opens correctly
super_admin.global_results: PASS - CRUD working, date picker and lottery filter present

company_admin.login_dashboard: PASS - Login successful, dashboard shows Company Overview
company_admin.schedules_readonly: FAIL - Page shows ADD SCHEDULE button, should be read-only
company_admin.results_readonly: FAIL - Page shows POST RESULT button, should be read-only
company_admin.configuration_tabs: PASS - All 5 tabs working (Général, Table des Primes, Limites, Mariage, Reçu)
company_admin.load_default_primes: PASS - 'Charger les défauts' button visible and working
company_admin.statistics_page: PASS - 5 tabs visible (Contrôle Agent, Blocage Boule, Limites, Lots Gagnants, Traçabilité)
company_admin.daily_reports_page: PASS - Generate report button working, shows recent reports

rbac_access_control.company_admin_no_schedule_create: PASS - Backend returns 404/405/422 when trying to POST
rbac_access_control.company_admin_no_result_create: PASS - Backend returns 404/405/422 when trying to POST
